ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED PURSUANT TO CCP 2033.280; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PAPERS SHOW THAT THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS WAS SERVED TO DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS OF RECORD ON JANUARY 30, 2014. THERE IS NO OBLIGATION TO FILE DISCOVERY WITH THE COURT. SANCTIONS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Greg Goldman, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. There being no appearance by any other party nor an objection filed or an objection by appearing counsel, the Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Order For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Monetary Sanction Be Awarded To Pltf
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT VICTORIA CARD's Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Order For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Monetary Sanction Be Awarded To Plaintiff is Off calendar because the case settled. Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Moiton And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280; Request For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBER F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. The moving papers show that the Request for Admissions was served to Defendant's address of record on January 30, 2014. There is no obligation to file discovery with the Court. Sanctions awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $100.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/JPT
